name: lens-cursor-free
description: Relay desktop open trust layer — UI, Electron shell, IPC contract

scripts.prebuild: node scripts/ensure-build-config.mjs && node scripts/gen-app-version.mjs && node scripts/gen-build-config.mjs
scripts.build: npm run prebuild && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/gen-user-messages.mjs && node scripts/copy-shell-assets.mjs
scripts.test: node --test scripts/gen-build-config.test.mjs scripts/gen-user-messages.test.mjs scripts/user-facing-error.test.mjs scripts/status-ui.test.mjs scripts/prepare-build-config.test.mjs scripts/check-release-config.test.mjs scripts/validate-build-config.test.mjs scripts/darwin-support.test.mjs scripts/build-flags.test.mjs
scripts.start: npm run link:core && npm run build && electron .
scripts.dist:ops: node scripts/prepare-build-config.mjs ops && node scripts/check-release-config.mjs --channel ops && npm run build:full && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --x64 -c.nsis.artifactName=Relay-Setup-${version}-ops.${ext}
scripts.dist:local: node scripts/prepare-build-config.mjs local && node scripts/check-release-config.mjs --channel local && npm run build:full && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --x64 --config.directories.output=release-build
